languages.text: "Истина заслуживается преданностью. Теперь, когда мы союзники, будь гото{mf|в|ва} услышать".

traits.locale_text: "Истина заслуживается преданностью. Теперь, когда мы союзники, будь гото{mf|в|ва} услышать".

languages.text: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."
languages.original_text: "Истина заслуживается преданностью. Теперь, когда мы союзники, будь гото{mf|в|ва} услышать".

traits.locale_text: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."
"Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."
"Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."

languages.text: “真相须以虔诚换取。既然我们已是盟友，就准备好听从指示吧。”
languages.original_text: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."

traits.locale_text: “真相须以虔诚换取。既然我们已是盟友，就准备好听从指示吧。”

languages.text: « La vérité est la récompense de la dévotion. Maintenant que nous sommes alliés, préparez-vous à écouter. »
languages.original_text: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."

traits.locale_text: « La vérité est la récompense de la dévotion. Maintenant que nous sommes alliés, préparez-vous à écouter. »

languages.text: "Hakikat, bağlılık yoluyla kazanılır. Artık müttefik olduğumuza göre dinlemeye hazır olmalısın."
languages.original_text: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."

traits.locale_text: "Hakikat, bağlılık yoluyla kazanılır. Artık müttefik olduğumuza göre dinlemeye hazır olmalısın."

languages.text: «La verdad se obtiene mediante la devoción. Ahora que somos aliados, prepárese para escuchar».
languages.original_text: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."

traits.locale_text: «La verdad se obtiene mediante la devoción. Ahora que somos aliados, prepárese para escuchar».

languages.text: "Wahrheit wird durch Hingabe erlangt. Nun, da wir Verbündete sind, hört mir genau zu."
languages.original_text: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."

traits.locale_text: "Wahrheit wird durch Hingabe erlangt. Nun, da wir Verbündete sind, hört mir genau zu."

languages.text: 「真実とは献身によって得られる。今や我々は同盟国である。耳を傾ける準備をせよ。」
languages.original_text: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."

traits.locale_text: 「真実とは献身によって得られる。今や我々は同盟国である。耳を傾ける準備をせよ。」
